args.message: Hi there! Thanks for showing me the car. First off, has it been in any accidents? And regarding the 'well-maintained' claim in the ad, what's been done recently?

text: Hi there! Thanks for showing me the car. First off, has it been in any accidents? And regarding the 'well-maintained' claim in the ad, what's been done recently?

speaker: seller

args.message: Accidents? Never! This BMW is as clean as they come. We have a whole stack of service records, and she's been meticulously cared for. Just last month, we actually had our top mechanic give her a full once-over – new fluids, filters, the works. She's ready to hit the road and turn heads!

args.message: Oh, you had an inspection done? That's fantastic! Shows you're a smart buyer. What did your mechanic say? I'm sure they'll agree this car is a real gem. We pride ourselves on transparency here, so I'm happy to answer any other questions you have!
